req.title: Appointment scheduling (boundary)
req.statement: A patient shall schedule an appointment at least 24 hours in advance during provider's available slots. Boundary cases on timestamps and numeric elements must be tested.
error_pathways: 422 when slot unavailable or in past

doc.reasoning: The requirement mandates a 24-hour advance booking rule during provider available slots. Key partitions are: (1) valid future slots >24 h ahead (positive/EP), (2) slots exactly at the 24-hour boundary (boundary/BVA), (3) slots inside 24 hours or in the past (negative/NEG), (4) unavailable slots (negative/DT), and (5) state transition from 'no appointment' to 'scheduled' then 'provider notified' (STC). Five tests are designed to cover all three mandatory kinds and all five heuristics.

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_valid_future_slot
preconditions: Patient is authenticated (valid JWT in session)
Provider has an open slot 48 hours from now
actions: Compute slot_time = now + 48 hours, rounded to next available 15-minute mark
Capture HTTP response status and body
expected: Response body slot_time matches requested slot_time
Provider notification event present in response or event log
trace: R-HLT-049: appointment at least 24 h in advance
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

def test_schedule_appointment_valid_future_slot(auth_client, provider_with_open_slot, freeze_time):
    slot_time = freeze_time + timedelta(hours=48)
    slot_iso = slot_time.isoformat()

    payload = {
        "patient_id": auth_client.patient_id,
        "provider_id": provider_with_open_slot,
        "slot_time": slot_iso,
    }

    resp = auth_client.post("/appointments", json=payload)

    assert resp.status_code == 201, f"Expected 201, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}"
    body = resp.json()
    assert "appointment_id" in body
    assert body["slot_time"] == slot_iso
    assert <notification_received>(body["appointment_id"]), "Provider not notified"

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_exactly_24h_boundary_accepted
preconditions: Provider has an open slot at exactly now + 24 hours + 1 second
Server clock is synchronised to UTC
actions: Compute slot_time = now + 24 hours + 1 second (just outside the forbidden zone)
trace: R-HLT-049: boundary — 24 h + 1 s is valid
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

def test_schedule_appointment_exactly_24h_boundary_accepted(auth_client, provider_with_open_slot, freeze_time):
    slot_time = freeze_time + timedelta(hours=24, seconds=1)
    slot_iso = slot_time.isoformat()

    payload = {
        "patient_id": auth_client.patient_id,
        "provider_id": provider_with_open_slot,
        "slot_time": slot_iso,
    }

    resp = auth_client.post("/appointments", json=payload)

    assert resp.status_code == 201, f"Boundary +1 s must be accepted, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}"
    body = resp.json()
    assert "appointment_id" in body
    assert body["slot_time"] == slot_iso

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_within_24h_rejected
preconditions: A provider slot exists 23 hours from now
Server clock is synchronised to UTC
actions: Compute slot_time = now + 23 hours (inside forbidden zone)
Capture HTTP response status and error body
expected: Error message indicates slot is too soon or in the past
trace: R-HLT-049: error pathway — 422 when slot in past or < 24 h
R-HLT-049: boundary — 24 h - 1 h is invalid
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

def test_schedule_appointment_within_24h_rejected(auth_client, provider_with_open_slot, freeze_time):
    slot_time = freeze_time + timedelta(hours=23)
    slot_iso = slot_time.isoformat()

    payload = {
        "patient_id": auth_client.patient_id,
        "provider_id": provider_with_open_slot,
        "slot_time": slot_iso,
    }

    resp = auth_client.post("/appointments", json=payload)

    assert resp.status_code == 422, f"Expected 422, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}"
    body = resp.json()
    assert "error" in body or "detail" in body, "Missing error detail in response"
    error_text = str(body.get("error") or body.get("detail", "")).lower()
    assert any(kw in error_text for kw in ["advance", "past", "unavailable", "24"]), \
        f"Unexpected error message: {error_text}"

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_unavailable_slot_rejected
preconditions: Target slot 48 hours from now is already booked by another patient
Provider ID and slot time are valid in all other respects
actions: Attempt to POST /appointments for the same provider and slot_time
trace: R-HLT-049: error pathway — 422 when slot unavailable
R-HLT-049: decision — future slot + already booked = reject
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import timedelta

def test_schedule_appointment_unavailable_slot_rejected(auth_client, booked_slot_fixture, freeze_time):
    provider_id, slot_iso = booked_slot_fixture(offset_hours=48)

    payload = {
        "patient_id": auth_client.patient_id,
        "provider_id": provider_id,
        "slot_time": slot_iso,
    }

    resp = auth_client.post("/appointments", json=payload)

    assert resp.status_code == 422, f"Expected 422 for taken slot, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}"
    body = resp.json()
    error_text = str(body.get("error") or body.get("detail", "")).lower()
    assert any(kw in error_text for kw in ["unavailable", "already booked", "conflict"]), \
        f"Unexpected error message: {error_text}"

tests.name: test_appointment_state_transition_scheduled_to_notified
preconditions: Provider has open slot 72 hours from now
Notification service mock is active and observable
actions: Poll notification log via <notification_log> helper until NOTIFIED event appears
expected: Notification log contains entry for appointment_id with event PROVIDER_NOTIFIED
trace: R-HLT-049: state transition NO_APPOINTMENT -> SCHEDULED -> PROVIDER_NOTIFIED
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import timedelta

def test_appointment_state_transition_scheduled_to_notified(auth_client, provider_with_open_slot, freeze_time):
    slot_iso = (freeze_time + timedelta(hours=72)).isoformat()
    payload = {
        "patient_id": auth_client.patient_id,
        "provider_id": provider_with_open_slot,
        "slot_time": slot_iso,
    }

    create_resp = auth_client.post("/appointments", json=payload)
    assert create_resp.status_code == 201
    appt_id = create_resp.json()["appointment_id"]

    get_resp = auth_client.get(f"/appointments/{appt_id}")
    assert get_resp.status_code == 200
    assert get_resp.json()["status"] == "SCHEDULED"

    notified = <poll_notification_log>(appt_id, event="PROVIDER_NOTIFIED", timeout=10)
    assert notified, f"Provider notification not received for appointment {appt_id}"
